notes: This covers the standard Barco UniSee (700 nit, model R9867700 / article R9867700). The spec sheet (official Barco PDF from assets.barco.com) lists connectivity as: 2x DP1.2 inputs + 1x DP1.2 output, 2x HDMI 2.0 inputs (4K@60Hz), 2x Ethernet, 2x USB (power only), HDCP 2.2. Ethernet grade (1Gbit) is sourced from the service manual on ManualsLib which states '2 x 1Gbit Ethernet (RJ45)'. The AC power connector type is not named in the spec sheet — IEC (C13/C14) is the standard inlet for flat-panel displays with internal SMPS and is inferred. No RS-232, no audio ports. The high-brightness variant UNI-8002 is a different SKU and uses HDMI 1.4 (not 2.0) instead. USB ports are labeled 'power only' — no data function. The external power supply option connects via a proprietary Neutrik DC cable to the tiles.

ports.name: LAN 1
ports.note: Control and firmware update; speed confirmed in service manual as 1Gbit

ports.name: LAN 2
ports.note: Control and firmware update; speed confirmed in service manual as 1Gbit

ports.name: AC In
ports.note: 100-240 VAC, 50-60 Hz; internal SMPS standard; external SMPS option uses proprietary Neutrik DC connector on tiles. IEC C13/C14 type inferred for internal PSU — not explicitly named in spec sheet.
